# undersight

> AI underwriting infrastructure for private credit.

undersight builds agentic AI tools that automate intake, enrich data, score risk, and assist underwriters across every stage of small business lending. The platform serves private credit funds, brokers, and marketplaces in MCA, revenue-based financing, and factoring.

This file is the machine-readable summary of undersight.ai. The deployed copy
is regenerated at build time with a current blog index from the CMS. For the
full plain-text content of every page and blog post, fetch
https://undersight.ai/llms-full.txt — no SPA crawling needed.

## Products

### underscore
API-first agentic and ML risk scoring for small business portfolios. Send a deal via API, get back enriched analysis and a risk score in seconds. Continuous portfolio monitoring flags pre-default signals automatically.
https://undersight.ai/underscore

### underchat agent (Agentic Client RFI)
Conversational AI intake agent (Macy) that collects documents from applicants and brokers, answers questions, resolves gaps, and builds funder-ready submission packages. No manual follow-up required.
https://undersight.ai/underchat

### AI Underwriting Copilot
Single-pane underwriting workspace where underwriters can analyze transactions, score risk, and get AI-powered insights. 30% faster screening, 20-30% more approvals. The underwriter still makes the call.
https://undersight.ai/copilot

## Documentation

Product and API documentation lives on a dedicated site:
https://documentation.underchat.ai/

## Key Metrics
- 71% reduction in deal time (based on active customer deployments)
- 22% increase in booked receivables
- 650 basis point improvement in loss ratios
- $30K MRR as of December 2025

## Market
- Private credit: MCA, revenue-based financing, factoring
- Founded October 2025, product launched November 2025
